documentation_impact.rationale: Operator-facing contracts, handbook routing, PRD retrieval paths, and bootstrap scripts changed; deferrals recorded for persona-designer globs and future .cursorignore.

deferred_items.rationale: Mirror-parity risk defers persona-designer.mdc glob edits.
Spec defers .cursorignore until explicit-read guarantees exist.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Changes preserve no-push, inbox notes ban, delegation, documentation-impact, policy-compliance, and summary-first PRD guidance without deleting protected semantics.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Recorded documentation-impact and deferrals; human remains in-loop for ratification-flagged surfaces.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Supports US-1 documentation discipline and future CLI workflow without claiming ddl is implemented.
